description: Filter, compare, and reshape tabular records.

tools.description: Filter a list of records, keeping only those where a field matches a condition. Use when the agent needs a subset of data by some criteria (e.g. amount over 1000, status equals open).

schema.name: data
schema.description: The records to filter, as a list of objects or a JSON array. Ignored when source_uri is set.

schema.name: field
schema.description: The field name to test on each record.

schema.name: operator
schema.description: One of: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, contains, startswith, regex, in, is_null, not_null.

schema.name: value
schema.description: The value to compare against (not needed for is_null/not_null).

schema.name: source_uri
schema.description: Optional AIDP URI to read input records from. Overrides the inline 'data' field. Format: master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path> or workspace:/<path>. File extension drives parsing: .json/.jsonl/.csv.

schema.name: dest_uri
schema.description: Optional AIDP URI to write the filter result to. Same URI format as source_uri. Extension drives serialization (.json full envelope, .jsonl/.csv just the matched rows). The structured envelope is still returned to the caller.

_confDescriptions.max_results: Cap on the number of matching records returned. Prevents oversized payloads back to the agent.
_confDescriptions.source_uri: Optional AIDP URI to read input records from instead of the inline 'data' field. Supports master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path> and workspace:/<path>.
_confDescriptions.dest_uri: Optional AIDP URI to write the filter result to. Extension (.json/.jsonl/.csv) controls the serialization.

tools.description: Diff two sets of records matched on a key field and report which were added, removed, and changed (with old/new values). Use to detect changes between two snapshots of data.

schema.name: left
schema.description: The first/old record set (list of objects or JSON array). Ignored when left_uri or a paired source_uri is set.

schema.name: right
schema.description: The second/new record set (list of objects or JSON array). Ignored when right_uri or a paired source_uri is set.

schema.name: key
schema.description: The id field used to match records across the two sets.

schema.name: source_uri
schema.description: Optional AIDP URI to a JSON document of the form {"left": [...], "right": [...]}. Format: master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path> or workspace:/<path>.

schema.name: left_uri
schema.description: Optional AIDP URI to read the left/old record set from. Takes precedence over both source_uri and inline 'left'.

schema.name: right_uri
schema.description: Optional AIDP URI to read the right/new record set from. Takes precedence over both source_uri and inline 'right'.

schema.name: dest_uri
schema.description: Optional AIDP URI to write the diff to. .json writes the full envelope (added/removed/changed/summary); .jsonl/.csv writes the 'changed' rows. The structured envelope is still returned to the caller.

_confDescriptions.tolerance: Numeric equality tolerance for float field comparisons. Values within this delta are treated as equal.
_confDescriptions.source_uri: Optional AIDP URI to a paired {left, right} JSON document. Use left_uri/right_uri instead for split inputs.
_confDescriptions.dest_uri: Optional AIDP URI to write the diff output to. Extension (.json/.jsonl/.csv) controls the serialization.

tools.description: Reshape tabular records: select or rename columns, sort, remove duplicates, or group-by and aggregate. Use for summarizing or restructuring data between flow steps.

schema.name: data
schema.description: The records to manipulate (list of objects or JSON array). Ignored when source_uri is set.

schema.name: operation
schema.description: One of: select, rename, sort, dedupe, groupby.

schema.name: spec
schema.description: Operation parameters as a JSON object. select:{columns:[...]}, rename:{map:{old:new}}, sort:{by:[...],ascending:true}, dedupe:{subset:[...]}, groupby:{by:[...],agg:{field:'sum'}}.

schema.name: source_uri
schema.description: Optional AIDP URI to read input records from. Overrides the inline 'data' field. Format: master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path> or workspace:/<path>. File extension drives parsing: .json/.jsonl/.csv.

schema.name: dest_uri
schema.description: Optional AIDP URI to write the reshaped rows to. Extension drives serialization (.json full envelope, .jsonl/.csv just the rows). The structured envelope is still returned to the caller.

_confDescriptions.max_rows: Cap on rows returned after the operation. Protects the agent context from large result sets.
_confDescriptions.source_uri: Optional AIDP URI to read input records from instead of the inline 'data' field. Supports master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path> and workspace:/<path>.
_confDescriptions.dest_uri: Optional AIDP URI to write the reshaped rows to. Extension (.json/.jsonl/.csv) controls the serialization.
